Our Story

A Legacy of Beautiful Spaces

Established in 2012, Wholesale Home Decor is a generational family business dedicated to bringing beautiful, high-quality home décor to retailers across America.

We source our products from artisans and manufacturers who share our commitment to craftsmanship, sustainability, and timeless design.

About Us Contact
About Us

A Legacy of Beautiful Spaces

Established in 2012, Wholesale Home Decor is a generational family business dedicated to bringing beautiful, high-quality home décor to retailers across America. What started as a small family venture has grown into one of the most trusted names in wholesale home décor.

We source our products from artisans and manufacturers who share our commitment to craftsmanship, sustainability, and timeless design. Every piece in our catalog is carefully selected to ensure it meets our high standards of quality and aesthetic appeal.

Our showroom at AmericasMart in Atlanta serves as a hub for retailers looking to discover the latest trends in home décor. We work closely with our network of distributors to ensure our products are accessible to retailers across the country.

At WHD, we believe that beautiful home décor should be accessible to everyone. We offer competitive wholesale pricing, flexible ordering options, and exceptional customer service to help our retail partners succeed.

Our Values

What We Stand For

🕯

Quality First

Every product is carefully curated and inspected before reaching our catalog. We stand behind everything we sell.

🌿

Family Values

As a family business, we treat our retail partners like family — with honesty, respect, and a long-term commitment.

🤝

Wholesale Partnership

We understand retail. Our pricing, minimums, and support are designed to help your business grow profitably.

Privacy Policy

How we collect, use, and protect your personal information

This Privacy Policy describes how Wholesale Home Decor (WHD) collects, uses, and protects information. Content is reproduced verbatim as provided by the client and constitutes a legal document.

1. Information We Collect

  • Name, email address, mailing address, phone number, payment information.
  • Collected when you: place an order, register for an account, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us.
  • Automatically collected: IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited and browsing behaviour.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To process and fulfil orders and provide customer support.
  • To personalise your shopping experience and improve our website, products, and services.
  • To send transactional emails (order confirmations, updates, etc.).
  • To send marketing and promotional communications (you may opt out at any time).
  • To detect and prevent fraud or unauthorised activity.

3. Sharing Your Information

  • We do not sell your personal information.
  • We may share with trusted third parties solely to operate our business.
  • We may disclose information to comply with legal obligations.

4. Cookies & Tracking Technologies

  • We use cookies to remember cart items, save preferences, analyse traffic, and deliver relevant advertisements.
  • You can disable cookies through your browser settings.

5. Email Communications

  • When you provide your email, you may receive order confirmations and promotional offers.
  • You can unsubscribe at any time via the unsubscribe link in our emails.

6. Data Security

  • We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL technology.
  • Payment information is processed through secure third-party gateways.
  • No method of internet transmission is 100% secure.

7. Your Privacy Rights

  • Depending on your location, you may access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data.
  • To exercise any of these rights, please reach out via the Contact Us page.

8. Third-Party Links

  • Our website may link to third-party sites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.

9. Children's Privacy

  • Our website is not intended for individuals under the age of 13.
  • We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

10. Changes to This Policy

  • We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

11. Contact Us
